ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., Environmental, Health) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the agency's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of complaint */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the complaint type (e.g., Sewer, Water System) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the complaint type (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type (e.g., Residential, Public Space) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_times" (
  "resolution_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution time record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint being resolved */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken to resolve the complaint (in hours) */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken specifically to resolve the complaint (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, agency staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint associated with the geolocation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the complaint location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the complaint location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency submitting the report */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reporting (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "last_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the last report submitted */,
  "next_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the next report due */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the agency (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the agent belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint the rating is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
